title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 419.050 - Penalty
text:
419.050.  Penalty. — Any hotel keeper who shall violate any of the provisions of section 419.040 or who shall charge any guest a greater rate than is specified in said notice shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and upon conviction thereof, shall be fined not less than ten dollars nor more than fifty dollars for each offense.
(RSMo 1939 § 9949) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13109; 1919 § 5887
